_request_preview: [turn-1] What would I owe out of pocket for a $2,000 lab test?
content: For a $2,000 lab test on your Silver plan, with $800 accrued toward your $2,000 deductible, you have approximately $1,200 remaining. You'd pay the remaining $1,200 deductible, then 20% of the residual $800, which is $160. Your estimated total is roughly **$1,360**.
